comments.LineComment: | AlphaSlider — Opacity/transparency control with checkerboard preview.
| The alpha slider controls color opacity (0-100%). It displays:
| - Color gradient from transparent to opaque
| | color         | Color     | RGB               | Base color (no alpha)  |
| | opacity       | Color     | Opacity (0-100)   | Current alpha value    |

value.value: linear-gradient(45deg, #ccc 25%, transparent 25%), linear-gradient(-45deg, #ccc 25%, transparent 25%), linear-gradient(45deg, transparent 75%, #ccc 75%), linear-gradient(-45deg, transparent 75%, #ccc 75%)
